essence: Diagnoses, repairs, and maintains vehicles to keep them safe and roadworthy.

identity.title: Automotive Technician
identity.summary: Inspects, services, and repairs cars and light vehicles, using diagnostic tools and mechanical expertise.

salary.notes: Master technicians, EV specialists, and dealership experts can exceed £50k+.

qualifications: Knowledge of vehicle systems and diagnostics
Experience with tools and workshop equipment
Understanding of safety and compliance standards

lifestyle.description: Automotive technicians work in garages, workshops, and dealerships. Days involve diagnosing faults, repairing components, performing services, and ensuring vehicles meet safety standards. The role suits hands-on problem-solvers who enjoy mechanical work.

habits: Stays updated on new vehicle technologies
